m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 2
Ω : Fin m → Type u_9
hΩ : (i : Fin m) → MeasureSpace (Ω i)
X : (i : Fin m) → Ω i → G
⊢ (∑ j, ∑ k, if j = k then 0 else d[X j # -X k]) ≤ ↑m * (↑m - 1) * @multiDist G hG inst✝² m Ω hΩ X

proof:
have : ∀ j k, j ≠ k → d[X j # -X k] ≤ D[X; hΩ] := by sorry

  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun j _ ↦ ?_)

  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun k hk ↦ ?_)) (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
  split_ifs with h
  · simp [h]
  · exact this j k h
